title: Dracula
tmdbOverview: In late 15th-century Eastern Europe, Prince Vlad II’s bride is brutally murdered. As a result, he renounces God and damns Heaven itself. Cursed with eternal life, Vlad is reborn as Dracula, an immortal warlord who defies fate in a blood-soaked crusade to wrench his lost love back from death.
synopsis: Dracula (2025) is a horror, fantasy and romance film from France. It carries a 6.2 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
